title: Significant Problem, Public Value, and Durable Need · Claim Repair Board
summary: A preserved decision record for significant problem, public value, and durable need contains one plausible evidence, scope, design, implementation, evaluation, or ownership defect. Find the first unsupported claim before changing the product. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in significance and public-value case and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evid…
objectives: Triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance.
Bound affected populations, contexts, frequency, severity, unequal burden, and who is missing from available evidence.
Study current services, manual workarounds, nonuse, competitors, public infrastructure, and build-nothing options.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Significance Evidence
steps.instruction:
debug case — A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The debug variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance.

Inspect the Significance Evidence trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Significance Evidence.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Significance Evidence, keep Significance Evidence connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: For Significance Evidence, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Significance Evidence, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Significance Evidence precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Significance Evidence, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The debug variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Significance Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Novel technology makes the addressed problem significant.

stimulus.title: Significance Evidence case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The debug variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Novel technology makes the addressed problem significant.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance. Artifact under review: significance and public-value case.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Significance Evidence, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Significance Evidence record says significance and public-value case looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect the failure record evidence boundary for Significance Evidence.

For inspect the failure record, apply Significance Evidence without its stated preconditions, omit the significance and public-value case trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Significance Evidence for significance and public-value case.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Durability Change
steps.instruction:
Append a capstone-durability-change-1phoxw: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Durability Change.

content.code:
capstone-durability-change-1phoxw:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Durability Change structural check is only one gate. significance and public-value case must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

steps.title: Publish the incident record · Debug Durability Change
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Durability Change: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The debug variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Test whether the need persists under policy, market, technology, organizational, and behavior change across the project horizon.

Evidence target: Publish the incident record · Debug Durability Change.
steps.why: Retrieving Durability Change through the concrete significance and public-value case case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Publish the incident record · Debug Durability Change, keep Durability Change connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Test whether the need persists under policy, market, technology, organizational, and behavior change across the project horizon.

hints: For Publish the incident record · Debug Durability Change, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Durability Change precondition, or invariant that must hold.
